formDescription: This section collects technical specifications for dams, reservoirs, dugouts, and ponds. It includes physical dimensions, construction materials, spillway and outlet details, fish management, and the identification of professional consultants involved in the project.

WSLICDugoutPondLocation.title: Location of dugout/pond:
WSLICDugoutPondLocation.description: Specifies if the dugout or pond is located within or off the stream channel.

WSLICDugoutStorageCapacity.title: Dugout/Pond Storage Capacity:
WSLICDugoutStorageCapacity.description: The total volume of water the dugout or pond can hold, in cubic metres (m³).

WSLICDugoutLength.title: Dugout/Pond Length:
WSLICDugoutLength.description: The length of the dugout or pond in metres.

WSLICDugoutWidth.title: Dugout/Pond Width:
WSLICDugoutWidth.description: The width of the dugout or pond in metres.

WSLICDugoutMaximumDepth.title: Dugout/Pond Maximum depth:
WSLICDugoutMaximumDepth.description: The maximum depth of the dugout or pond in metres.

WSLICDamHeight.title: Dam Height:
WSLICDamHeight.description: The height of the dam structure in metres.

WSLICDamLength.title: Dam Length:
WSLICDamLength.description: The total length of the dam structure in metres.

WSLICDamCrestWidth.title: Dam Crest Width:
WSLICDamCrestWidth.description: The width of the top (crest) of the dam in metres.

WSLICDamFootprintArea.title: Foot print area for dam:
WSLICDamFootprintArea.description: Total area covered by the dam structure and building materials (allowing 10m beyond actual structure), in hectares (ha).

WSLICDamMaterial.title: Dam Material:
WSLICDamMaterial.description: The primary material used to construct the dam.

WSLICReservoirLocation.title: Location of reservoir:
WSLICReservoirLocation.description: Specifies if the reservoir is located within or off the stream channel.

WSLICReservoirStorageCapacity.title: Reservoir Storage Capacity:
WSLICReservoirStorageCapacity.description: The total volume of water the reservoir can hold, in cubic metres (m³).

WSLICReservoirFloodedArea.title: Reservoir Flooded Area:
WSLICReservoirFloodedArea.description: The total area of land that will be submerged by the reservoir, in hectares (ha).

WSLICReservoirFreeboard.title: Reservoir Freeboard:
WSLICReservoirFreeboard.description: The vertical distance between the water level and the top of the reservoir containment in metres.

WSLICSpillwayType.title: Spillway Type:
WSLICSpillwayType.description: Classification of the spillway as controlled (with gates) or uncontrolled.

WSLICSpillwayGateType.title: Spillway Gate Type:
WSLICSpillwayGateType.description: The mechanical design of the spillway control gates.

WSLICSpillwayDesignFlow.title: Spillway Design Flow:
WSLICSpillwayDesignFlow.description: The maximum flow rate the spillway is designed to handle, in cubic metres per second (m³/s).

WSLICSpillwayFreeboard.title: Spillway Freeboard:
WSLICSpillwayFreeboard.description: The safety margin of distance above the design flow level in metres.

WSLICSpillwayWidth.title: Spillway Width:
WSLICSpillwayWidth.description: The physical width of the spillway channel in metres.

WSLICSluicewayLLOType.title: LLO Type:
WSLICSluicewayLLOType.description: Material or design of the Lower Level Outlet (LLO) or sluiceway.

WSLICSluicewayGateType.title: Gate Type (LLO):
WSLICSluicewayGateType.description: The specific gate mechanism used for the Lower Level Outlet.

WSLICFishKeepFish.title: Do you want to keep fish in the dugout/pond/reservoir?
WSLICFishKeepFish.description: Indicates if fish will be stocked or kept, which may trigger requirements for a Rainbow Trout Pond Permit or Aquaculture Licence.

WSLICMoreThanOneDamReservoir.title: Is there more than one dam/reservoir?
WSLICMoreThanOneDamReservoir.description: Indicates if the application involves multiple containment structures.

WSLICNumberOfDamsReservoirs.title: Number of dams/reservoirs:
WSLICNumberOfDamsReservoirs.description: The total number of dams or reservoirs in the proposed development plan.
